class OllamaWorker:
    def __init__(self, store: StateStore, worker: dict[str, Any]):
        self.store = store
        self.worker = worker

    def chat(self, prompt: str, schema: dict[str, Any], *, temperature: float = 0.1) -> dict[str, Any]:
        endpoint = self.worker["endpoint"].rstrip("/") + "/api/chat"
        payload = {
            "model": self.worker["model"],
            "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": prompt}],
            "stream": False,
            "format": schema,
            "keep_alive": self.worker.get("keep_alive", "10m"),
            "options": {"temperature": temperature},
        }
        body = json.dumps(payload).encode("utf-8")
        request = urllib.request.Request(
            endpoint,
            data=body,
            headers={"Content-Type": "application/json"},
            method="POST",
        )
        with self.store.worker_lock(self.worker["node_id"]):
            try:
                with urllib.request.urlopen(request, timeout=int(self.worker.get("timeout_seconds", 900))) as response:
                    raw = response.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
            except urllib.error.HTTPError as exc:
                detail = exc.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
                raise HubError(f"Ollama HTTP {exc.code} from {self.worker['node_id']}: {detail}") from exc
            except (urllib.error.URLError, TimeoutError) as exc:
                raise HubError(f"Ollama request failed for {self.worker['node_id']}: {exc}") from exc
        envelope = json.loads(raw)
        content = envelope.get("message", {}).get("content", "")
        result = extract_json_object(content)
        result["_metrics"] = {
            "model": envelope.get("model"),
            "total_duration": envelope.get("total_duration"),
            "prompt_eval_count": envelope.get("prompt_eval_count"),
            "eval_count": envelope.get("eval_count"),
        }
        return result

    def health(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
        endpoint = self.worker["endpoint"].rstrip("/") + "/api/tags"
        started = time.monotonic()
        try:
            with urllib.request.urlopen(endpoint, timeout=10) as response:
                data = json.loads(response.read().decode("utf-8"))
            models = [entry.get("name") for entry in data.get("models", [])]
            return {
                "ok": True,
                "node_id": self.worker["node_id"],
                "endpoint": self.worker["endpoint"],
                "configured_model": self.worker["model"],
                "model_present": self.worker["model"] in models,
                "models": models,
                "latency_seconds": round(time.monotonic() - started, 3),
            }
        except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001 - doctor must report all failures
            return {
                "ok": False,
                "node_id": self.worker["node_id"],
                "endpoint": self.worker["endpoint"],
                "configured_model": self.worker["model"],
                "error": str(exc),
            }


class RepositorySnapshot:
    def __init__(self, config: dict[str, Any], job_dir: pathlib.Path):
        self.config = config
        self.source = pathlib.Path(config["repository"]).expanduser().resolve()
        self.job_dir = job_dir
        self.workspace = job_dir / "workspace"
        self.snapshot_report = job_dir / "snapshot.json"

    def create(self, additional_paths: Iterable[str] = ()) -> dict[str, Any]:
        if not (self.source / ".git").exists():
            raise HubError(f"Configured repository is not a Git repository: {self.source}")
        self.workspace.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=False)
        source_head_before = run_command(["git", "rev-parse", "HEAD"], cwd=self.source, timeout=60, check=True)["stdout"].strip()
        source_status_before = run_command(["git", "status", "--short"], cwd=self.source, timeout=60, check=True)["stdout"]
        tracked = run_command(
            ["git", "ls-files", "-z"],
            cwd=self.source,
            timeout=120,
            check=True,
        )["stdout"].split("\0")
        listed: list[str] = [value for value in tracked if value]
        tracked_set = set(listed)
        for raw in additional_paths:
            try:
                relative = normalize_relative_path(raw)
            except HubError:
                continue
            candidate = self.source / relative
            if relative not in tracked_set and candidate.exists() and candidate.is_file() and not candidate.is_symlink():
                listed.append(relative)
                tracked_set.add(relative)
        cfg = self.config["snapshot"]
        copied: list[str] = []
        skipped: list[dict[str, str]] = []
        total = 0
        for raw in listed:
            if not raw:
                continue
            try:
                relative = normalize_relative_path(raw)
            except HubError as exc:
                skipped.append({"path": raw, "reason": str(exc)})
                continue
            parts = pathlib.PurePosixPath(relative).parts
            if any(name in cfg["exclude_names"] for name in parts):
                skipped.append({"path": relative, "reason": "excluded directory name"})
                continue
            if any(relative.startswith(prefix) for prefix in cfg["exclude_prefixes"]):
                skipped.append({"path": relative, "reason": "excluded prefix"})
                continue
            if any(relative.endswith(suffix) for suffix in cfg["exclude_suffixes"]):
                skipped.append({"path": relative, "reason": "excluded suffix"})
                continue
            source_file = self.source / relative
            if source_file.is_symlink():
                skipped.append({"path": relative, "reason": "symbolic links are excluded from snapshots"})
                continue
            if not source_file.is_file():
                skipped.append({"path": relative, "reason": "not a regular file"})
                continue
            size = source_file.stat().st_size
            if size > int(cfg["maximum_single_file_bytes"]):
                skipped.append({"path": relative, "reason": f"file too large ({size} bytes)"})
                continue
            if len(copied) >= int(cfg["maximum_files"]):
                raise HubError("Snapshot maximum file count exceeded.")
            if total + size > int(cfg["maximum_total_bytes"]):
                raise HubError("Snapshot maximum total size exceeded.")
            destination = self.workspace / relative
            destination.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
            shutil.copy2(source_file, destination)
            copied.append(relative)
            total += size
        run_command(["git", "init", "-q"], cwd=self.workspace, check=True)
        run_command(["git", "add", "-A"], cwd=self.workspace, timeout=300, check=True)
        run_command(
            [
                "git",
                "-c",
                "user.name=Moreno Unified Delegator",
                "-c",
                "user.email=moreno-delegator@localhost",
                "commit",
                "-q",
                "-m",
                "snapshot baseline",
            ],
            cwd=self.workspace,
            timeout=300,
            check=True,
        )
        source_status = run_command(["git", "status", "--short"], cwd=self.source, timeout=60, check=Tru
